info.title: Cocohub API
info.description:
## Overview

The Cocohub API powers the Cocohub mobile app — a blockchain-backed pet health management platform.

### Key capabilities
- **Pet management** — register pets, upload photos, look up by QR code
- **Medical records** — create and retrieve vet visit records with rich structured data
- **Blockchain verification** — anchor medical record hashes on the Stellar network for tamper-proof integrity
- **Appointments** — book, reschedule, and cancel vet appointments
- **Medications** — track medication schedules and dosing history
- **Offline sync** — queue-based sync with conflict resolution for offline-first mobile use

### Authentication

All protected endpoints require a JWT access token in the `Authorization` header:

```
Authorization: Bearer <token>
```

Tokens are obtained via `POST /auth/login` or `POST /auth/register`.
When a token expires, the client automatically calls `POST /auth/refresh` with the stored refresh token.

### Rate limiting

- Login/register endpoints: 10 requests per minute per IP
- All other endpoints: 100 requests per minute per user

### Error format

All errors follow a consistent shape:
```json
{
  "success": false,
  "error": {
    "code": "VALIDATION_ERROR",
    "message": "Human-readable description",
    "details": { "field": "email", "issue": "Invalid format" }
  },
  "timestamp": "2024-01-15T10:30:00Z"
}
```

tags.name: Authentication
tags.description: Login, register, token refresh, OAuth, and password management

tags.name: Users
tags.description: User profile management and role-based access

tags.name: Pets
tags.description: Pet registration, profile management, and QR code lookup

tags.name: Medical Records
tags.description: Vet visit records with blockchain-backed integrity verification

tags.name: Blockchain
tags.description: Stellar blockchain integration for tamper-proof medical record anchoring

post.description: Authenticates a user with email/password credentials. Returns a short-lived JWT access token and a long-lived refresh token. Store both tokens securely (Keychain on iOS, SecureStore on Android).
Creates a new user account. Sends a verification email to the provided address. Returns JWT tokens immediately so the user can start using the app before verifying their email.

error.message: An account with this email already exists

post.description: Exchanges a valid refresh token for a new access token. The old refresh token is invalidated. Called automatically by the API client interceptor on 401 responses.

401.description: Refresh token expired or invalid — user must log in again

error.message: Session expired — please log in again

post.description: Invalidates the server-side session. The client should also clear locally stored tokens. This is a best-effort call — local token cleanup always proceeds even if this request fails.
Verifies the user's email address using the token sent to their inbox.
Sends a password reset link to the provided email address. Always returns 200 to prevent email enumeration attacks.

200.description: Reset email sent (or silently ignored if email not found)

example.message: If that email is registered, a reset link has been sent

post.description: Resets the user's password using the token from the reset email.
Authenticates or registers a user via a social OAuth provider (Google, Apple, Facebook). The client obtains an authorization code from the provider and passes it here.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of users. Requires admin role.
Returns the profile of the currently authenticated user.
Returns a user profile by ID. Admins can access any user; regular users can only access their own profile.

put.description: Updates editable user profile fields. Admins can update any user; regular users can only update their own profile.

delete.description: Permanently deletes a user account. Requires admin role.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of pets. Owners see only their own pets; vets and admins can see all pets.

post.description: Registers a new pet. The `ownerId` must match the authenticated user's ID (or the user must be an admin).

get.description: Returns full pet details including owner summary.

put.description: Updates editable pet fields. Only the pet owner or an admin can update a pet.

delete.description: Permanently deletes a pet and all associated records. Only the pet owner or an admin can delete a pet.

get.summary: Look up pet by QR code
get.description: Retrieves a pet profile by scanning its QR code. Used by the QRScannerScreen. The QR code value is a URL-encoded string containing the pet ID and a CryptoJS checksum for tamper detection.

parameters.name: qrCode
parameters.description: URL-encoded QR code value from the pet's QR tag

get.description: Returns all pets belonging to a specific owner.

200.description: List of pets for the owner

get.description: Returns a paginated list of medical records with optional filters.

parameters.name: endDate
parameters.description: Filter records up to this date (inclusive)

post.description: Creates a new medical record for a pet. After creation, the record hash is automatically anchored on the Stellar blockchain asynchronously. The `isBlockchainVerified` field will be `false` until anchoring completes.

example.notes: Pet is in excellent health. Weight stable at 28kg.

get.description: Returns a single medical record with full details including blockchain verification status.

put.description: Updates a medical record. Note: blockchain-verified records (`isBlockchainVerified: true`) cannot be modified — any update attempt will return 409.

409.description: Record is blockchain-verified and cannot be modified

error.message: This record has been anchored on the blockchain and cannot be modified

delete.description: Deletes a medical record. Blockchain-verified records cannot be deleted.

409.description: Record is blockchain-verified and cannot be deleted

get.summary: Get all medical records for a pet
get.description: Returns all medical records for a specific pet, ordered by visit date descending.

get.summary: Get medical records for a pet (nested route)
get.description: Alias for GET /medical-records/pet/{petId}. Supports the same query parameters.
Returns appointments. Owners see their pets' appointments; vets see their own appointments; admins see all.

parameters.name: toDate
parameters.description: Filter appointments up to this date (inclusive)

post.description: Books a new appointment for a pet with a veterinarian.

error.message: The requested time slot is already booked

get.description: Returns full appointment details including vet and pet summaries.

put.description: Updates appointment details. To cancel, set `status` to `CANCELLED` and provide `cancellationReason`.

get.description: Returns medications for a pet. The `petId` query parameter is required.

parameters.name: petId
parameters.description: Pet ID to fetch medications for

post.description: Creates a new medication schedule for a pet.

example.name: Apoquel
example.instructions: Give with food. Monitor for side effects.

put.description: Updates a medication schedule. Use `status: "discontinued"` to stop a medication early.

post.summary: Anchor a record hash on Stellar
post.description: Stores a SHA-256 hash of a medical record on the Stellar blockchain. The hash is embedded in a Stellar transaction memo field. Returns the transaction details once confirmed.

post.summary: Verify a record hash against Stellar
post.description: Verifies that a given SHA-256 hash matches the hash anchored on the Stellar blockchain for the specified record. Returns `verified: true` if the hashes match (record is untampered).
Verifies up to 50 record hashes in a single request. Useful for bulk integrity checks.

get.summary: Retrieve anchored hash for a record
get.description: Fetches the hash and transaction details that were anchored on Stellar for a specific record.
Fetches full details of a Stellar transaction by its hash.
Returns Stellar transaction history, optionally filtered by record or account.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of transactions to return

get.description: Returns current Stellar network status including the active ledger number.

BearerAuth.description:
JWT access token obtained from `POST /auth/login` or `POST /auth/register`.

**Example:**
```
Authorization: Bearer eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9...
```

Tokens expire after 7 days. Use `POST /auth/refresh` to obtain a new token.

ApiKeyAuth.name: X-API-Key
ApiKeyAuth.description: API key for server-to-server integrations. Contact engineering@cocohub.app to obtain a key.

password.description: User password (min 8 chars, must include upper, lower, number, special)
Must include uppercase, lowercase, number, and special character

refreshToken.description: The refresh token issued at login

token.description: Password reset token received via email
Email verification token received via email

code.description: OAuth 2.0 authorization code from the provider

token.description: JWT access token — include as Authorization: Bearer {token}

refreshToken.description: Long-lived refresh token for obtaining new access tokens

expiresIn.description: Access token lifetime in seconds (default: 7 days)

pets.description: Lightweight references to pets owned by this user

dateOfBirth.description: Pet date of birth in YYYY-MM-DD format

notes.example: Pet is in excellent health. Weight stable.

hash.description: SHA-256 hash of the record payload

minutesBefore.description: Minutes before appointment to send reminder

frequency.description: How often the medication should be administered

durationDays.description: Total duration of the medication course in days

instructions.example: Give with food. Monitor for side effects.

sourceAccount.description: Stellar account that submitted the transaction

verified.description: True if the submitted hash matches the on-chain anchored hash

onChainHash.description: The hash stored on the Stellar blockchain

hash.description: SHA-256 hex hash of the medical record payload

metadata.description: Optional metadata to anchor alongside the hash

hash.description: SHA-256 hash to verify against the on-chain record

records.description: Array of record ID + hash pairs to verify (max 50)

BadRequest.description: Bad request — invalid input or missing required fields

Unauthorized.description: Unauthorized — missing or invalid JWT token

error.message: Server error. Please try again later.
